title: CLOTHING AND HOUSEHOLD GOODS - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION ROSEBURG CLOTHING AND HOUSEHOLD GOODS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing vouchers once every 12 months for children and adults. Vouchers are also provided for household items. 3130 NE Stephens Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Clothing vouchers: Unrestricted Household items vouchers: For those that have had fires or first time getting into a place after being homeless. Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-noon Clothing vouchers: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-noon Household vouchers: Appointment only Email (541) 672-6581 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 672-6581 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Clothing vouchers: Walk in during program hours Household vouchers: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Adults: Photo ID and mailing address Minors: Any document with name and birth date on it AREA SERVED: Douglas County SITE HOURS: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-6pm Services: Clothing Vouchers Household Goods Vouchers Work Clothing Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION ROSEBURG
